description: A transaction has been cancelled. The agent must facilitate the release of the earnest money deposit based on the cancellation agreement.

nodes.task_description: Receive the fully signed cancellation agreement, noting which party is to receive the earnest money.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the buyer is entitled to the refund.

nodes.task_description: Draft the earnest money release instructions for the escrow holder.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates the formal release instructions.

nodes.task_description: Send the release instructions to both the buyer and seller for signature, then forward to escrow.

expected_outcome.value: Agent coordinates the signing and delivery of the release instructions.
